name: Focus CMY Compact
comment: Delivering best-in-class power and versatility, the ADJ Focus CMY Compact is an automated luminaire capable of functioning interchangeably as a beam, spot or wash. Powered by a 400-watt LED engine it delivers output of up to 14,500 lumens. An extensive suite of beam shaping tools begins with full CMY + CTO color mixing and also includes two GOBO wheels, two rotating prisms, two frost filters, and Aria X2 wireless, as well as motorized zoom (3°~52°) and focus. All of this is packed into a compact and robust fixture that weighs less than 45 lbs. (20kg).

capabilities.comment: Random Strobe Effect Slow to Fast

capability.comment: CMY / Color Macro Speed Max -> Min
